Tests if the `Boolean` function returns a boolean type for a true value.

# Purpose
This code is a simple assertion test that checks the type of the result of the `Boolean` function when passed a `true` value. It verifies that the `Boolean` function correctly returns a value of type `boolean`. This is a narrow functionality test, ensuring that the JavaScript `Boolean` function behaves as expected when converting a `true` value. The use of `assert` indicates that this code is likely part of a test suite or a validation script.
